channel.title: VexPivot Blog
channel.description: Building apps that work with your brain, not against it. Product reviews, launch announcements, and wellness insights from VexPivot.

item.title: FocusPivot: The ADHD Focus Timer That Works With Your Brain
item.description: FocusPivot is an ADHD focus timer designed for neurodivergent minds. Learn how adaptive focus sessions, visual time displays, and gentle task launches help you...

item.title: HoneyDew: The Gentle Habit Tracker for Self-Care That Actually Sticks
item.description: HoneyDew is a gentle habit tracker and wellness quest app built for burnout recovery, mental health, and self-care routines that don't rely on shame or streaks.
